summary: A recorded Fox Business segment from 'The Evening Edit', posted by ICE. The layout shows inset nighttime footage of a protest with figures and tear-gas haze in front of a building (labeled as Portland, Oregon) at upper left, a female anchor and a male guest in later boxes, and Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons appearing as a guest. A red lower-third chyron reads 'DEMS' NEW WEBSITE TRACKING ICE SPARKS DOJ FURY' with a Fox Business bug and a market ticker along the bottom. The narration concerns a proposed ICE-tracking website and officer safety. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: Inset nighttime protest footage with tear-gas haze (labeled Portland, OR) at upper left; the Acting ICE Director at right; chyron 'TODD LYONS / ACTING ICE DIRECTOR' over 'DEMS' NEW WEBSITE TRACKING ICE SPARKS DOJ FURY'.
Three-box layout: protest footage at left, a female anchor center, the male guest at right; Fox Business market ticker along the bottom.

notable_text: TODD LYONS; ACTING ICE DIRECTOR; DEMS' NEW WEBSITE TRACKING ICE SPARKS DOJ FURY; FOX BUSINESS; THE EVENING EDIT
